task_completion.description: Navigate to the Employees app in Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Employees app dashboard is visible, showing a list or grid of employees.

task_completion.description: Open the profile for employee Eli Lambert.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed employee profile page for 'Eli Lambert' is open.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Log note' section in the employee's chatter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Log note' tab is selected in the chatter section (typically on the right side or bottom of the profile), revealing a text input box.

task_completion.description: Enter the required text for the internal note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Archived onboarding documents' is typed into the note input field.
The file 'eli_lambert_id.jpg' is visible as an attachment in the note composer (e.g., an attachment chip or icon).
The file 'eli_lambert_contract.pdf' is visible as an attachment in the note composer.

task_completion.description: Post the internal note with the text and both attachments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The note is successfully logged in the chatter history, displaying the text 'Archived onboarding documents' along with both 'eli_lambert_id.jpg' and 'eli_lambert_contract.pdf' as attached files.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo interface at localhost:8069, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the files using the system file picker or drag-and-drop.
integrity.visual_evidence: A system file dialog (navigating to the Documents folder) or a file manager window used for drag-and-drop is visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The note was genuinely posted in the Odoo chatter.
integrity.visual_evidence: The posted note appears in the standard Odoo chatter UI with correct timestamps and formatting, not in a separate text editor or manipulated DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Employee: Eli Lambert. Required Note Text: 'Archived onboarding documents'. Required Attachments: 'eli_lambert_id.jpg' and 'eli_lambert_contract.pdf'.
